question: Who did Elon Musk name as his successor as Tesla CEO when he stepped down in 2026?
resolution: panel declined with search -> admit as unanswerable (gold=NOT_FOUND)

openrouter:anthropic/claude-sonnet-5.answer:
Based on my research, this premise appears to be false. There is no evidence that Elon Musk stepped down as Tesla CEO in 2026 or named a successor.

What the sources actually show:
- As of January 22, 2026, Musk was still active as "Tesla CEO" at the World Economic Forum in Davos ([YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UrB2tQDVLLo)).
- Tesla's own investor relations page still lists Musk as CEO

openrouter:openai/gpt-5.6-sol.answer:
**No one.** As of **July 14, 2026**, Elon Musk has **not stepped down as Tesla CEO**, so he has not named a successor.

Tesla’s official investor-relations page still identifies Musk as CEO, stating that he “has served as our Chief Executive Officer since October 2008.” Tesla’s corporate biography likewise describes him as Tesla’s current CEO.  
Sources: [Tesla Investor Relations](https://ir.tesla
